name: Dask-ML (Scalable Machine Learning with Dask)

auth.notes: Local library; Dask cluster credentials for distributed

performance.notes: Scales to datasets larger than RAM; distributed cluster needed for best perf

agent_readiness.notes: Sklearn-compatible ML for out-of-core and distributed datasets. from dask_ml.model_selection import train_test_split. from dask_ml.preprocessing import StandardScaler. from dask_ml.decomposition import PCA. Scikit-learn compatible estimators. Incremental learning: dask_ml.wrappers.Incremental wraps sklearn estimators. Hyperparameter search: dask_ml.model_selection.GridSearchCV. Uses Dask arrays/dataframes as input. Distributed training via Dask cluster. XGBoost and LightGBM Dask integrations.

gotchas: Not all sklearn estimators are replaceable — many require full in-memory data
Dask cluster setup adds significant operational complexity
Debugging distributed ML failures is hard
XGBoost/LightGBM native distributed often faster than dask-ml wrapping
best_when: Preprocessing datasets larger than RAM with sklearn-compatible API
Hyperparameter search distributed across Dask cluster workers
When sklearn pipelines need to process Dask DataFrames
Incremental learning (online learning) on streaming data
avoid_when: Datasets that fit in RAM (sklearn faster)
summary: Dask-ML extends scikit-learn for out-of-core and distributed datasets via Dask. dask_ml.preprocessing.StandardScaler, dask_ml.model_selection.GridSearchCV work on Dask arrays/dataframes. Incremental wrapper for online learning. XGBoost/LightGBM Dask integrations. Best for preprocessing pipelines on datasets larger than RAM. Use sklearn directly when data fits in memory.
